TimeEntry.Title: SGC Monthly Site Scan - April 2026
TimeEntry.Notes: Verified and reviewed the scan for SGC to confirm scope and requirements, followed by setting up the necessary site access permissions. Created and configured a new site scan for SGC and completed the application setup in Azure, ensuring all required configurations and integrations were in place. Initiated the scan after successful setup, monitored its progress, and validated the generated reports for accuracy and completeness. Once verified, uploaded the final reports to the designated SGC Microsoft Teams channel and ensured proper documentation of all completed activities.
